introSection: Hydro Racer is a steel water roller coaster located at Xishuangbanna Sunac Land in Xishuangbanna, Yunnan, China. It opened with the park on 26 September 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride was supplied by Intamin.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 10 riders per car.

fullText:
Hydro Racer is a steel water roller coaster located at Xishuangbanna Sunac Land in Xishuangbanna, Yunnan, China. It opened with the park on 26 September 2015.

The ride was supplied by Intamin.

5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 10 riders per car.
